# E2E Test Data

## Sample PDFs

- `sample_paper.pdf` - "Attention Is All You Need" (arXiv 1706.03762) - Full paper for testing PDF ingestion

## arXiv Paper IDs for Testing

Use these IDs in the ingestion panel for E2E testing:

| ID | Paper | Notes |
|----|-------|-------|
| 1706.03762 | Attention Is All You Need | Foundational transformers paper |
| 2005.14165 | Language Models are Few-Shot Learners (GPT-3) | Large language models |
| 1810.04805 | BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers | NLP pre-training |
| 2303.08774 | GPT-4 Technical Report | Latest GPT model |
| 2010.11929 | An Image is Worth 16x16 Words (ViT) | Vision transformers |

## Test Queries for Ask Flow

- "Find papers about transformers"
- "What papers cite Attention Is All You Need?"
- "What has Vaswani published?"
- "How are transformers and BERT connected?"
